blocks.title: Indoor air
blocks.content: The product is not intended for indoor use and hence no specific VOC emission tests are performed.

blocks.title: Soil and water
blocks.content:
The product is not intended for indoor use and hence no specific VOC emission tests are performed.

Theproduct does not come in contact with soil or water.

All impact categories are mainlydetermined by the raw materials supply in A1. For GWP(and to less extend also the values

for ODP, FAETP and MAETP) also the incinerationemissions at the end of life have a significant environmental impact. The

potential creditsfor thermal and electricalenergy are declared in module D and result in negative valuesfor most of the

impact categories.
